meta.notes: Orchestrator: chunks text, fetches personas, builds prompts, then fires 5 sub-workflows in parallel (waitForSubWorkflow: false). IMPORTANT: after importing all 6 workflows, replace the REPLACE_WITH_* placeholder IDs in each Execute node with the actual numeric workflow IDs from your n8n instance. Sub-workflows: workflow-1a-sub-text, workflow-1b-sub-image, workflow-1c-sub-audio-tts, workflow-1d-sub-audio-bard, workflow-1e-sub-video. Env vars: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
